ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  "university_type" TEXT /* Type of institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the publisher is located */,
  "publisher_type" TEXT /* Type of publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_title" TEXT /* Title of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "scopus_id" TEXT /* Scopus ID of the journal */,
  "issn_l" TEXT /* ISSN-L (Linking ISSN) of the journal */,
  "eissn" TEXT /* eISSN (Electronic ISSN) of the journal */,
  "journal_type" TEXT /* Type of journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the author */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* Researcher ID of the author */,
  "google_scholar_id" TEXT /* Google Scholar ID of the author */,
  "academic_degree" TEXT /* Highest academic degree earned by the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  "author_role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agreement */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the agreement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the agreement */,
  "agreement_type" TEXT /* Type of agreement */,
  "agreement_status" TEXT /* Status of the agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agreements_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agreements_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the fee was paid */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee */,
  "fee_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the fee */,
  "fee_payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used to pay the fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used to make the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, device) used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the report was requested */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
